response:
A business description for a Google My Business profile targeting first-time home buyers and home buyers in Orlando, FL, can be rewritten as follows:

**Business Description:**  
Established in 2002, Paul Giles & The Vintage Team at Compass is a trusted real estate agency dedicated to providing expert guidance to homeowners and business owners throughout central Florida. Our team offers comprehensive support for both buyers and sellers, covering all aspects of real estate transactions and financing. We aim to build long-term relationships with our clients, ensuring a reliable and personalized experience throughout their real estate journey. Located in key areas such as Conway, Orlando, Maitland, Winter Park, Windermere, Altamonte Springs, Delaney Park, and the Lake Nona Region, we serve a wide range of clients across the region. Our small team of real estate experts is committed to delivering quality service and support to help you achieve your home-buying or selling goals.
